title: Build a multi-step wizard LiveView
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/wizard_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.WizardLive) that renders a 3-step form wizard using a single LiveView. State: @step (integer 1..3), @form_data (map). handle_event("next", params, socket) advances the step and merges params. handle_event("back", _, socket) steps back. Step 3 posts to handle_event("finish", _, socket) which returns {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: ~p"/done")}. Render uses :if={@step == 1} / :if={@step == 2} / :if={@step == 3}.
tier_rationale: Multi-step state machine inside a single LiveView. Several event handlers + conditional rendering.
